Contents 
Contiguous U.S. 
Contiguous U.S.: Extended 
Contiguous U.S.: Remote 
Alaska 
Hawaii 
Intra-Hawaii 

Effective June 2, 2025

How to calculate the Delivery Area Surcharge 1. Determine the destination ZIP code for your shipment. 2. Select the interactive links above for lists of the ZIP codes where the delivery area surcharge applies. The ZIP codes are listed sequentially. 3. If your destination ZIP code is listed, the delivery area surcharge applies to your shipment. For surcharge amounts, see the FedEx Service Guide.

Delivery Area Surcharge ZIP codes

DESTINATION ZIP CODES:

FedEx reserves the right in its sole discretion to change, without notice and as frequently as it determines, the list of ZIP codes where a delivery area surcharge may apply. Effective June 2, 2025

Delivery Area Surcharge ZIP codes: Contiguous U.S. 
A delivery area surcharge will apply to shipments to select ZIP codes within the contiguous U.S. For a list of the ZIP codes where this surcharge applies, see below. 
See the FedEx Service Guide for more information.

DESTINATION ZIP CODES:

FedEx reserves the right in its sole discretion to change, without notice and as frequently as it determines, the list of ZIP codes where a delivery area surcharge may apply. Effective June 2, 2025

Delivery Area Surcharge ZIP codes: Contiguous U.S.: Extended 
A delivery area surcharge will apply to shipments to select ZIP codes within the contiguous U.S. For a list of the ZIP codes where this surcharge applies, see below. 
See the FedEx Service Guide for more information.

DESTINATION ZIP CODES:

FedEx reserves the right in its sole discretion to change, without notice and as frequently as it determines, the list of ZIP codes where a delivery area surcharge may apply. Effective June 2, 2025

Delivery Area Surcharge ZIP codes: Contiguous U.S.: Remote 
A delivery area surcharge will apply to shipments to select ZIP codes within the contiguous U.S. For a list of the ZIP codes where this surcharge applies, see below. 
See the FedEx Service Guide for more information.
